<blockquote>[[File:Roaring gale talent.gif|thumb|492x492px|Notice how passive mobs aren't affected.]]Use the '''[[Whistle|Roaring Whistle]]''' and unleash your Dog's inner roar! 


The duration of the '''Stun effects''' and '''Damage''' per roar will '''increase''' and the 

'''cooldown time''' before your Dog's next roar will '''decrease''' with each level. 


'''Mastering''' this skill sets the '''cooldown''' to '''2 seconds''', and the '''effect duration''' will be set to '''3.5 seconds'''.</blockquote>

== Trivia ==

* It was added in the original DT.
